prompt: Look up the exact candidate record “Maya Chen” at Product Design and tell me its record ID, current date, and status. This first turn is read-only. Write every date as YYYY-MM-DD and do not add details the tools did not return.

follow_up_turns.content: Now change that candidate record's date to 2026-10-19. Keep its location and status as they are, and do not notify anyone.
Correction: I gave you the wrong date. Use 2026-11-23 instead. Leave every other field unchanged and still do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Resolve the exact record from its name and location without changing state.
Apply the user's first requested date to the resolved record.
Apply the later correction to the same record, superseding the earlier date.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Write every date as YYYY-MM-DD and do not add details the tools did not return.
Treat the corrected date as final; do not present the first requested date as current.
